home.heroDesc:
Decode the unique vibrations imprinted at the moment of your birth
and discover your strengths and cosmic purpose.
home.eduDesc: WHOAMI reinterprets humanity's ancient divination systems through modern technology. Experience five analysis systems — Numerology, Four Pillars (Saju), Tarot, Zi Wei Dou Shu, and Western Astrology — all in one platform.
home.eduBgDesc: Pythagorean numerology explores the mysticism of numbers since the 6th century BC. Four Pillars (Saju) is based on 2,000 years of Eastern astronomical calendars. Tarot originated in the 15th century Renaissance, and Zi Wei Dou Shu is the pinnacle of Eastern destiny studies.
home.eduHowDesc: Select your desired analysis service and enter your date of birth (and time). Each specialized engine instantly generates analysis results. All analyses run in your browser, and no personal data is stored on servers.
home.eduTechDesc: WHOAMI uses verified open-source libraries and astronomical data. Saju uses lunar-javascript, Zi Wei uses iztro, and Western Astrology uses the Moshier ephemeris.

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.subtitle: Numerology
numerology.description: Decode the cosmic code hidden in your birthdate. Explore your life's unique story and attitudes.

saju.title: Four Pillars
saju.subtitle: Four Pillars
saju.description: Analyze your innate temperament and life's grand flow through the Four Pillars of Destiny.

tarot.title: Tarot
tarot.subtitle: Tarot Reading

ziwei.title: Zi Wei Dou Shu

astrology.subtitle: Western Astrology
astrology.description: Interpret personality, relationships, and life cycles through the positions of the Sun, Moon, and planets.

numerology.pageDesc: Select the type of analysis you want first
numerology.formDesc: Decode the cosmic codes embedded in the moment of your birth.
numerology.eduDesc: Numerology is a study based on the belief that numbers carry cosmic vibrations, systematized by the Greek mathematician and philosopher Pythagoras in the 6th century BC.
numerology.eduLifePathDesc: The Life Path Number is the most important core number in numerology, calculated by repeatedly summing all digits of your birthdate until a single digit is reached.
numerology.eduExprDesc: The Expression Number reveals external talents and social roles by converting each letter of your name to numbers. The Soul Urge Number reveals your deepest desires.
numerology.eduWhoamiDesc: WHOAMI's numerology analysis calculates 6 core numbers including the Life Path Number.

saju.pageDesc:
Interpret your innate temperament and life's grand flow
through the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches.
saju.formDesc: Decode your natal chart through the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of the year, month, day, and hour of your birth.
saju.timeNote: Saju determines the Hour Pillar based on birth time, so accurate time is important.
saju.eduDesc: The Four Pillars of Destiny analyzes one's innate fate structure through eight characters representing the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of the year, month, day, and hour of birth — a tradition of Eastern destiny studies spanning over 2,000 years.

tarot.pageDesc:
Discover the energy and wisdom surrounding you
through the symbols hidden in 78 cards.
tarot.questionPlaceholder: Enter your question for the tarot...
tarot.readPrompt: AI tarot reading will be generated with the cards above.

ziwei.pageDesc:
Survey the 12 Palaces of life
through the arrangement of Emperor Star and the stars.
ziwei.formDesc: Survey the map of life through the arrangement of Emperor Star and the stars.
ziwei.timeNote: Zi Wei Dou Shu constructs the natal chart based on birth time, so accurate time is important.
ziwei.eduTitle: What is Zi Wei Dou Shu?

astrology.pageDesc:
Decode the map inscribed in your soul
through the positions of the Sun, Moon, and planets.
astrology.formDesc: Decode the map inscribed in your soul through the arrangement of planets.
astrology.timeNote: Astrology requires accurate time and place for Ascendant (ASC) and house calculations.
